title: US authorizes release of Anthropic's Mythos 5 to over a hundred organizations
summary: Anthropic's artificial intelligence model, previously restricted, returns with limited access to select US entities.

title: Steam Machine pre-orders resold on eBay for up to $3,000
summary: The launch of Valve's console triggers resale and scalping, doubling prices before its official release.

title: PlayStation and Xbox sales in May hit historic lows
summary: Both consoles recorded their worst May in the United States due to high prices and lower demand.

title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 Sol with restrictions and accusations of cheating in tests
summary: OpenAI's new model sparks controversy by showing questionable performance in software evaluations.

title: Intel Nova Lake will require up to 474W and three 8-pin connectors on Z990 motherboard
summary: Intel's upcoming high-performance processors will demand extreme power, requiring more robust power supplies.

title: Apple pressures Washington to buy Chinese memory chips from CXMT
summary: The company seeks to circumvent restrictions to acquire chips from sanctioned Chinese firm CXMT.

title: New laptops and RTX 5060 graphics cards expand NVIDIA's offerings
summary: ASUS launches new RTX 5060 variants and gaming laptop prices drop by up to $300.

title: Publishers sue Microsoft and OpenAI for illegal use of content to train AI
summary: The landscape of lawsuits against artificial intelligence expands as copyright claims grow.

title: Apple prepares M5 and M7 chips for touchscreen MacBook and future AI models
summary: Apple's plans include skipping the high-end M6 and focusing on an M7 optimized for artificial intelligence.

title: Intel Arc B770 GPUs emerge as a real alternative to NVIDIA and AMD
summary: Intel would introduce its new Arc B770 graphics card, which could compete in the mid-to-high-end market.

title: GTA 6 will not have a physical disc version according to rumors
summary: Rockstar's anticipated game would only be available in digital format.

title: Key Apple Vision Pro executive leaves company to join OpenAI
summary: The person responsible for developing the mixed reality headset moves to the artificial intelligence company.

title: J.P. Morgan warns of multiple red flags in the AI market
summary: The investment bank identifies risks of overvaluation and bubble in the artificial intelligence sector.

title: Samsung prepares $648 billion investment in artificial intelligence
summary: The South Korean company plans the biggest corporate bet to take advantage of the AI boom.

title: Qualcomm develops new chip architecture for smartphones
summary: The company plans to innovate in mobile processor design to improve performance and efficiency.

title: Ford tried to replace veteran engineers with AI and had to rehire them after failure
summary: The automaker acknowledged that artificial intelligence could not replicate the experience of its senior employees.

title: FTC approves Elon Musk's acquisition of startup Mesh
summary: The US regulator gives the green light to the purchase of the networking company founded by former SpaceX employees.

title: Insurance startup Corgi denies stealing open source product
summary: The company responds to allegations of software misappropriation.

title: European Union launches its own artificial intelligence chatbot called Eustella
summary: The conversational assistant aims to compete with US alternatives by offering transparency and data control.

title: YouTube removes 'dislike' button on Shorts and adds double speed playback
summary: The platform modifies its interface for short videos, prioritizing user experience.
